mapper.select: SELECT p.PLACE_ID as placeId, p.PLACE_NAME as name, p.ADDRESS as region, p.DESCRIPTION as description, a.CHECKINTIME as checkinTime, a.CHECKOUTTIME as checkoutTime FROM PLACE p JOIN ACCOMMODATION a ON p.PLACE_ID = a.PLACE_ID WHERE p.PLACE_ID = #{placeId}

SELECT r.ROOM_ID as roomId, r.ROOM_NAME as roomName, r.ROOMBASECOUNT as roomBaseCount, r.MAX_CAPACITY as maxCapacity, r.AMOUNT as amount, r.ROOMINTRO as roomIntro,
(SELECT MIN(ri.IMAGE_URL) FROM ROOM_IMAGE ri WHERE ri.ROOM_ID = r.ROOM_ID) as roomImageUrl
FROM ROOM r WHERE r.PLACE_ID = #{placeId} ORDER BY r.AMOUNT ASC
SELECT ROOM_ID as roomId, ROOM_NAME as roomName, ROOMBASECOUNT as roomBaseCount, AMOUNT as amount FROM ROOM WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE EXPIRE_AT < SYSDATE
mapper.select: SELECT SESSION_ID FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkin}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ROOM_LOCK (ROOM_ID, CHECKIN_DATE, SESSION_ID) VALUES (#{roomId}, #{checkin}, #{sessionId})
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM ROOM_LOCK WHERE ROOM_ID = #{roomId} AND CHECKIN_DATE = #{checkin} AND SESSION_ID = #{sessionId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO ORDERS (ORDER_ID, MEMBER_ID, ORDER_DATE, TOTAL_AMOUNT, COUPON_DISCOUNT, REAL_TOTAL_AMOUNT, STATUS) VALUES (#{merchantUid}, #{memberId}, SYSDATE, #{amount}, 0, #{amount}, 'SUCCESS')

SELECT RESERVATION_SEQ.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO RESERVATION ( RESERVATION_ID, ROOM_ID, MEMBER_ID, PARTNER_ID, CHECK_IN_DATE, CHECK_OUT_DATE, GUEST_COUNT, STATUS, REQUEST, AMOUNT, COMMISSION_RATE, PARTNER_COUPON_FEE ) VALUES ( #{reservationId}, #{roomId}, #{memberId}, 1, TO_DATE(#{checkin}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), TO_DATE(#{checkout}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), (#{adult} + #{child}), 'SUCCESS', '요청사항 없음', #{amount}, 10, 0 )
